title: Russian minecraft logo
description: this resource pack adds a translation for the game logo
body:
# **This resource pack is available on:**
[![с](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e569d1e1692e389f30b75c87cc4a75091079d0d5.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/russian-minecraft-logo)
[![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3256354959623559e62dfea3161df612b5bef929.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/russian-minecraft-logo)

----------------------------------------------
![about mojang logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc5de07665df3562088aec99ba40311f78dbc120.png)
### **If you don't have translated mojang logo, you **have** to download a [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)**
-------------------------------------------
![this resource pack translates:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e688e39cc2ae87d56bdf5f988a630714b3022e32.png)
- **Minecraft logo**
- **java edition logo**
- **Minecraft realms logo**
- **"minceraft" logo**
- **Mojang logo**

**I took this resource pack as a basis:
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ukrainian-texts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ukrainian-texts)**

**I recommend playing with this resource pack - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/russian-splashes!**

## **what was translated:**
### **Minecraft and java edition logo**
![minecraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9a9b80bbdfc7aec335daf5c4d417046f2a8aea.png)
### **Minecraft Realms logo**
![realms logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdd5945a03a968a8787879f1f9c847c3d6c7e773.png)
### **Mojang logo (puzzle or optifine required)**
![mojanglogonew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/004d7585951041b9c4fbe746cee87be0ca3449bb.png)

**---------------------------------------------------------**
![plans logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c70e966576c89fb5d9f7ec3cdfa1585500e42e6.png)
- **~~translate mojang logo~~**
